data.body: LANDING (Gerrit §4): feature branch refs/heads/feature/oss-readiness created off gerrit/main (1b77c6da); rebased the 10 epic commits onto current gerrit/main (was 7 behind) — clean, tree re-verified green (typecheck 267 files, lint, 27 schema/types tests). Pushed the 10-commit chain for review as Gerrit changes 291-300. Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified on each, then submit bottom-up + a --no-ff merge-back change into main.
